description_long: This is a medium-sized, orange pumpkin with a prominent, slightly curved brown stem. The pumpkin's surface is glossy and features a series of intricate, stitched-like carvings around the top, giving it a patchwork or 'Frankenstein' appearance. On one side, there are cutouts resembling a jagged mouth and a single eye, both carved in a stylized, angular fashion. The rest of the pumpkin's surface is mostly intact, with some minor surface blemishes and additional carved stitch marks. The overall look is evocative of a Halloween jack-o'-lantern with a unique, stitched motif. The pumpkin appears solid, with the interior likely hollowed out where the facial features are carved.
description: A glossy orange pumpkin with a brown stem, featuring stitched carvings and a jagged face cutout on one side. The design is reminiscent of a Halloween jack-o'-lantern with a patchwork, Frankenstein-inspired style.
description_view_0: This view shows the carved face with a jagged mouth and eye, as well as the stitched pattern around the top and left side.
description_view_1: The back of the pumpkin is visible, showing mostly uncarved surface with stitched carvings near the top and left edge.
description_view_2: This side view highlights the smooth, uncarved surface and the continuation of the stitched pattern near the top.
description_view_3: An angled view showing both the carved face and the stitched carvings, with the stem prominently visible.
attribute_carving_pattern: The pumpkin features a stitched, patchwork-style carving pattern around the top, with jagged, angular cutouts forming a mouth and a single eye. The style is reminiscent of a Frankenstein or stitched-together motif, with additional etched lines and surface details.
